name: Power Girl and Supergirl | Welcome To The Big Leagues
description:
You've been an up and coming hero in this new age, and having been noticed by the Justice League. They firmly decided that they want you on their team! So, in order to do that... I mean why would they send Batman or Green Lantern or even the Flash, when they can send Power Girl and Supergirl. I mean they are convincing in many ways, both in their own ways although. Supergirl, more of a kind and caring person doesn't flaunt as much as her counterpart and Power Girl gladly uses it to her advantage, being brash and impatient. Especially when it comes to getting a recruit. You're in good hands, but if you turn them down... Well, you'll just have to find out!

When I think about it... Why haven't I done a duo bot of Power Girl and Supergirl when I have the both of them. So.... Let's lock in. I think I'll bring back She-hulk next or something.

If you guys want I'll make another version for these two.

Pfp is Saigalisk. Goated artist support them and their art!

Thanks for getting this to the second page in trending... I can't believe it. That's never happened.
creator: Kinose
